name: sql_instructions_cornerstone_silver_features
description: SQL execution agent examples for Cornerstone (CSOD) silver-layer feature engineering for training compliance.

items.question: Which users have trainings past due (raw evidence view)?
items.instructions: List learners with past-due assigned trainings to validate ingestion and identify immediate compliance gaps.
items.sql:
SELECT person_key, learning_object_id, obligation_code, due_at, training_status, days_past_due
FROM public.hr_training_instances
WHERE due_at IS NOT NULL AND due_at < NOW() AND training_status NOT IN ('completed','waived')
ORDER BY days_past_due DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 200;

items.question: Show SOC2 training risk for in-scope people (latest snapshot).
items.instructions: Return SOC2 training risk with driver and class labels for triage queues.
items.sql:
SELECT t.snapshot_ts, t.person_key, t.obligation_code,
       t.soc2_raw_impact, t.soc2_raw_likelihood, t.soc2_raw_risk,
       t.training_impact_class, t.training_likelihood_class, t.training_risk_level,
       t.training_risk_driver_primary
FROM public.soc2_training_risk_timeseries t
WHERE t.snapshot_ts = (SELECT MAX(snapshot_ts) FROM public.soc2_training_risk_timeseries)
ORDER BY t.soc2_raw_risk DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 200;

items.question: Show HIPAA training risk for ePHI workforce (latest snapshot).
items.instructions: Return HIPAA training risk with driver and class labels for remediation routing.
items.sql:
SELECT t.snapshot_ts, t.person_key, t.obligation_code,
       t.hipaa_raw_impact, t.hipaa_raw_likelihood, t.hipaa_raw_risk,
       t.training_impact_class, t.training_likelihood_class, t.training_risk_level,
       t.training_risk_driver_primary
FROM public.hipaa_training_risk_timeseries t
WHERE t.snapshot_ts = (SELECT MAX(snapshot_ts) FROM public.hipaa_training_risk_timeseries)
ORDER BY t.hipaa_raw_risk DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 200;

items.question: Which obligations have a coverage gap (obligation exists but not assigned)?
items.instructions: Find people in-scope for an obligation but missing a corresponding training assignment instance.
items.sql:
SELECT s.person_key, s.framework, s.obligation_code
FROM public.hr_training_scope s
LEFT JOIN public.hr_training_instances i
  ON i.person_key = s.person_key AND i.obligation_code = s.obligation_code
WHERE i.person_key IS NULL
ORDER BY s.framework, s.obligation_code
LIMIT 200;
items.context: Coverage gaps are control failures even if completion is high elsewhere.
